name: Familja Kuqézi
overview: The Kuqézis are definitely a model family, not in the sense that they're perfect, but in the fact that despite the problems they go through, they remain a positive family where morality, mutual respect and the best values ​​prevail.

trailers.title: Tring Promo| Familja Kuqezi| E shtune 19.00 ne Jolly HD, E hene 21.30 ne Smile
